system.description:
Disarms or harmlessly discharges traps with thieves' tools. Hastily: 1 round; botch on natural 1–3 triggers the trap; a failed hasty attempt cannot be repeated until the next level. Methodically: 1 turn, +4 bonus, repeatable; botch only on natural 1. Detection pattern for the linked traps module: /trapbreak/i.

Auto-scales with the owner's class level in party rolls (RR p. 31): L1: 18+ · L2: 17+ · L3: 16+ · L4: 15+ · L5: 14+ · L6: 13+ · L7: 11+ · L8: 9+ · L9: 7+ · L10: 5+ · L11: 3+ · L12: 2+ · L13: 2+ · L14: 1+. For a class using the skill at half level, set the module's levelFactor flag to 0.5.
